data.title: Most of the crypto market sectors experienced a significant correction, and ETH rose 1.95% against the trend
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily reported on February 18 that according to SoSoValue data, most of the crypto market sectors experienced a significant correction, with a general 24-hour decline of about 1% to 4%. It is worth noting that ETH rose against the trend, with a 24-hour increase of 1.95%, while Solana (SOL) fell 6.01% due to various factors. In addition, the Layer2 sector rose by 0.15%. Within the sector, Mantle (MNT), Arbitrum (ARB), and Optimism (OP) rose by 5.41%, 1.92%, and 3.69%, respectively.
The AI ​​sector briefly rose before pulling back, with a 24-hour drop of 5.25%. Within the sector, Virtuals Protocol (VIRTUAL) fell 7.90%, ai16z (AI16Z) fell 12.18%, and AI Rig Complex (ARC) fell 26.16%.
In terms of other sectors, the CeFi sector fell 0.84% ​​in 24 hours, the DeFi sector fell 1.64%, the Layer1 sector fell 2.45%, and the PayFi sector fell 3.30%. Within the sector, XRP fell 3.09%, Stellar (XLM) fell 3.62%, but Telcoin (TEL) bucked the trend and rose 29.99%; the Meme sector fell 3.83%.

data.title: Musk confirms AI game studio plan, reiterates "Make games great again!"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News On February 17, overseas blogger Dima Zeniuk posted a photo of Musk and several people on the X platform, and wrote that xAI is about to open an AI game studio. Later, Musk himself confirmed the news, emphasizing that "this matter must be done well" and reiterated "Make games great again!". (Jinshi)

data.title: Chairman of the South Korean Financial Services Commission: Upbit sanctions review is about to end
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Kim Byung-hwan, Chairman of the Financial Services Commission (FSC) of South Korea, announced that he will soon make a decision to sanction Upbit for violating customer verification obligations. He said: "Compared with other sanctions, I expressed my intention to resolve this issue as soon as possible because there are areas that may affect the market and we are proceeding accordingly." He added: "We have held several meetings to listen to the opinions of relevant parties." (Yonhap News Agency) 
Previously in January, Upbit was ordered to suspend business and rectify by the South Korean financial regulatory authorities for violating anti-money laundering obligations such as the customer identification system (KYC). The Financial Information Analysis Institute (FIU) of the Financial Services Commission of South Korea notified Upbit in advance on the 9th of this month of sanctions with suspension of business as the main content because it violated the Specific Financial Transaction Information Act. If the punishment is finalized, Upbit will restrict business related to new customers during the suspension period (up to 6 months), but existing users can still trade on Upbit. Upbit can submit an opinion on this punishment to the FIU before the 20th of this month. After receiving Upbit’s appeal, the FIU will hold a sanctions review meeting on the 21st of this month to finally determine sanctions matters such as the suspension period.

data.title: The U.S. government's government efficiency department has saved about $55 billion in federal spending so far
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The official website shows that so far, the U.S. Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) has saved about 55 billion U.S. dollars in federal spending.

data.title: A whale deposited more than $9 million in ETH, AAVE and COMP to Binance 11 hours ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, 11 hours ago, a whale deposited 2,390 ETH (about 6.7 million US dollars), 7,964 AAVE (about 2.19 million US dollars) and 2,321 COMP (about 132,000 US dollars) into Binance.

data.title: Grok Pro costs $300 per year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the product code disclosed by analyst Aaron, Grok Pro costs US$300 per year.

data.title: Binance to Support Rootstock (RIF) Network Upgrade and Hard Fork
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance is expected to suspend the token recharge and withdrawal services of the Rootstock (RIF) network at 19:00 on March 12, 2025 (Eastern Time Zone 8) to support its network upgrade and hard fork.
The project will perform a network upgrade and hard fork at block height 7,338,024 (estimated at 20:00 on March 12, 2025, Eastern Time Zone 8).

data.title: Grok Pro Subscription Priced At $300 Annually
data.description: According to Odaily, analyst Aaron has revealed that the annual subscription fee for Grok Pro is set at $300.

data.title: Argentina President Javier Milei Denies Accusations of Promoting LIBRA Token
data.description:
Argentine President Javier Milei claims he only shared information about the project out of technological enthusiasm.
source: https://coincu.com/322898-president-javier-milei-denies-accusations

data.title: REVOX and Four.meme have reached a strategic cooperation to jointly promote the development of the BNB chain AI proxy ecosystem
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BNB Ecosystem AI Agent Project REVOX and BNB Chain Token Launch Platform Four.meme announced a strategic cooperation to jointly promote the innovative application of AI agent technology in the BNB ecosystem and accelerate the process of Web3 intelligence.
As an important promoter of the BNB ecosystem, Four.meme has successively launched popular projects such as $Broccoli, $TST, $SIREN, and $CaptainBNB, and continues to help the development of the BNB ecosystem.
As a representative project of AI agent and Launchpad tracks in the BNB Chain ecosystem, REVOX is building a decentralized AI agent system to promote the deep integration of AI technology and Web3. Its core products Web3 GPT Lense and decentralized AI Agent platform REVOX Studio have covered multiple scenarios such as smart asset analysis, on-chain AI interaction, and smart transaction execution, and the number of global users has exceeded 21 million.
This cooperation will combine Four.meme's market influence with REVOX's technical advantages in the field of AI to jointly explore more possibilities of AI empowering Web3 and inject new vitality into the BNB ecosystem.
